messages.text: Hello! Welcome to the Grievance Registration System. I am here to help you register your complaint today. May I know your full name please?
Once you can play later on
Thank you, Once you can play later on! Could you tell me which category your issue falls under? Is it Water Supply, Electricity, Road, Sanitation, Network, or something else?
Hello Nagraj, I've noted your name. Now, could you please describe the issue you're facing?
So, I am facing the road issue, could you provide me the helpline number?
I understand how frustrating that must be, Nagraj. Based on our records, the Roads and Sanitation department can be reached at 1545. Let me confirm - you're facing a road issue, is that correct?
so can I register and complain

Yes, Nagraj, you can definitely register a complaint. Let me confirm - you'd like to report a road issue and you're expecting a resolution within 24 hours for a temporary patching of a dangerous pothole, correct?
So, there is a sinkhole in my road, so which department can help me?
I understand how concerning that must be, Nagraj. Based on our records, for a road cave-in or sinkhole, which is an emergency, you should call 1545 immediately.

Nagraj, you should call 1545 immediately to report the road cave-in or sinkhole. Let me confirm - you're experiencing a road cave-in or sinkhole, and you're looking for the emergency number, is that correct?
So, how many days it will take?
I understand your concern, Nagraj. According to our records, the Roads and Sanitation department should send a survey team within 7 days to assess the issue, and action will be taken within 15 days.
